data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by reducing the number of choices available at one time.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs interactive elements for easier and faster access.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Applies Gestalt principles to create a coherent and visually appealing interface.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Enhances user experience by maintaining consistency with user experiences of other sites.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits information presentation to enhance user comprehension and retention.
